title: KOSIS Gross Domestic Product and Expenditure (current prices, annual), Bank of Korea National Accounts (2020 Standard)
source_org: Statistics Korea (KOSIS), data originated by Bank of Korea
download_url: https://kosis.kr/statHtml/downGrid.do (POST) + https://kosis.kr/statHtml/downNormal.do (POST) — see cpi/manifest.json notes for the flow
units: billions of Korean Won (Bil.Won), current prices
license_terms: KOSIS (Statistics Korea) — Open Government Data, free reuse with attribution
notes: Full expenditure-approach GDP breakdown: GDP, compensation of employees, operating surplus, consumption of fixed capital, taxes/subsidies, private and government final consumption, gross fixed capital formation, inventory changes, exports/imports, statistical discrepancy, net factor income, and GNI — all as a single annual time series 1970-2025. Same anonymous-download mechanism as kosis-korea/cpi (no login/API key required); see that manifest's notes for the technical details of the 2-step downGrid.do/downNormal.do flow. Table: orgId=301 (Bank of Korea, publishing via KOSIS), tblId=DT_200Y113, found via KOSIS English-language search for 'Gross Domestic Product'. Sibling tables in the same category (GDP by economic activity, GDP deflator, quarterly indicators, regional income, 2015-standard vintage, etc.) exist and were not all pulled — this flagship current-price annual table was judged sufficient for a comparator dataset.
